subject: flag-count-equals-ADD doctrine
source_form: 'Each of the following is what makes up the technical difficulty of a freestyle move. Each of these is equal to one Add (element of difficulty).'
modern_doctrine: Modern uses modifier-stack math which is a pedagogical layer on top of flag counts
resolution_recommendation: document the flag-count doctrine as foundational
notes: CRITICAL FOUNDATIONAL DOCTRINE: flag-count = ADD count. Modifier-stack math is consistent IF flag contributions are correctly modeled. When divergent flag count is canonical per source

subject: 5 ADD categories taxonomy
source_form: DELAY DEXTERITY UNUSUAL SURFACE BODY CROSS BODY
modern_doctrine: Modern operational notation flags directly map: [del] [dex] [uns] [bod] [xbd]
resolution_recommendation: document the 5-category taxonomy as foundational glossary content
notes: 23-year doctrinal continuity. The 5 categories are the canonical building blocks of all ADD math

subject: Pogo ADD value (source vs Red pt5)
source_form: Source: pogo 'usually worth 2 adds more than its non-pogo namesake'
modern_doctrine: Modern Red pt5: pogo=+0/+0 set modifier
resolution_recommendation: surface as Red Wave 2 with reconciliation explanation
notes: CRITICAL FINDING explaining 5-compound +1 ADD divergence from paradoxMoves PD-2. Source counts structural contribution (+1 dex + +1 body from symposium element); modern modifier value represents 0 INCREMENT because the dex and body are already counted via operational flags. The 4-audit cross-cutting pogo/symposium question has a resolution path here

subject: Pixie 'directly following toe set' timing constraint
